response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive fullstack experience across multiple domains, including TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-like systems (e.g., MongoDB in prior roles). His background aligns well with the required skills, though his recent career gap may warrant discussion. His open-source contributions and expertise in scalable architectures (e.g., Kubernetes, AWS) are notable, but his lack of direct PostgreSQL experience and limited React/Nest.js exposure in recent roles slightly reduce his fit.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and JavaScript expertise across frontend and backend development
Proven experience with scalable architectures (Kubernetes, AWS, microservices)
Demonstrated ability to learn rapidly and deliver pragmatic solutions across the stack
concerns: Recent career gap (2025–present) without clear explanation or re-engagement in professional development
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (mostly MongoDB in prior roles)
No recent or explicit React/Nest.js experience in listed employment history
